```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
# Full convergence-gate detail, rendered inside the collapsed Technical checks
# section after the compact badge has given the verdict before any finding.
# Renders diagnostics_summary.json (loaded as diag_summary in _setup.qmd) through
# the shared banner in dse_research_utils, so every DSE report uses the same
# PASS/REVIEW detail and the rendering logic lives in one place.
from dse_research_utils.statistics.diagnostics import convergence_banner_markdown

print(convergence_banner_markdown(diag_summary))
```
